data.body: Change 1 (drift A+C acting heal) landed for review as Gerrit change 249. New binding_walk.py: level-triggered iteration over the BINDING STORE that targeted-reads off-snapshot (archived/deleted) locals and dispatches classify() Decisions — TERMINAL_TRANSITION (class A / 444d: drive live Jira->Done) + PROBE_GET->RETIRE_AFTER_GRACE (class C / 13eb: GC dead binding after grace, reversible). Breaker-gated before any mutation; snapshot-absence never = deletion (ADR 0028/L17); dry-run computes plan w/ no side effects. Wired into run_differs. 10 RED-first cells green; full reconciler suite (1121) green; lint+typecheck clean. Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified votes before submit + completion-verifier close of 444d/13eb.
